case_title: RENT A CENTER VS HUFFMAN,PANDORA FAY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $346.00 FILED BY RENT A CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT HUFFMAN,PANDORA FAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
